name: PHANTOM | PiNet DApp — AI-Native Tactical Audio Workstation
description: A decentralized PiNet DApp built on the Minima blockchain. Features on-chain pattern provenance via Omnia state anchoring, Axia NFT tokenization, Maxima P2P mesh sync, real-time neural pattern generation with Gemini AI, Web Audio synthesis, and MIDI hardware integration. Runs on Raspberry Pi 5 with PiNet_Os Kernel v2.
